titleStmt.title: SII 7.376: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 376. (A.R. No. 171 of 1901). ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE PANCHALINGESVARA TEMPLE AT KOTAKERI NEAR BARAKUR, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha
mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakarappa
śrīmatpāṇḍyacakrava¨rtti bhujabaḷakaviyāḷpē
ndradēvaru bārakanyāpura daramaneyali
sukasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttire
sakava¨rṣa 1077 neya yuvasaṁvatsarada ka¨rkaṭa
māsa prathamasōmavāradaṁdu śrīkāśmīra śrī
jilada śrīprava¨rppurada Ādhiṣṭānada pajjerapu
rada sthānadalu huṭṭida śrīsāradādēviya
ṇada śrīyūṭirāṇara dēgonarāṇirā
Avara makkaḷu śrīsāvāsimaṇinōjarāṇa nava
ra tamma śrīsājirāṇanu panni¨rppaḷḷiyoḷu guḍi
gallu nālgaṁḍugada padinālku mūḍe bittuva (me)
mekke bhūmiya A¨rtthamaṁgoṭṭanitaṁ koṁḍu śrī
darasaru pradhānarapa he¨rggaḍeyu Ā Ūra
nāḷva pāṁḍyamahādēviyara nagarasamūhakke
neladavaru voṁdāgi¨rdu mūlasthāna mā¨rkkaṁḍē
śvaradēvarallu viccēdageydaṟe salvarāgi teṟeya
sa¨rvva bādhāparihāravāgi yeṟasi koṁḍu dhārā
pū¨rvvakavāgi [E]ṟadukoṭṭa tappu bhūmiya nēgilu
hūḍida sāvāsigaḷe guṁḍikeya payisā
makkaḷā makkaḷāḷu poḍeyarī dha¨rmma
ma nācaṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁbaraṁ pālisali ja dēva
ya bhadēvē dānaṁgeyda
phalamaneyduvaru Upēkṣisi
da¨rgge geṁge vāraṇāsi rāmēśvara kurukṣētra
dalu sāvirakavileyaṁ kūṁda pātakara gatiya
neyduvaru yi dha¨rmmavanuḷidaḍe pratipāḷisida
¨rgge gaṁge vāraṇāsi rāmēśvara kurukṣētradalu
Aśamēdha yāgamaṁ sāyiragōdānamumaṁ
bhōjanamumaṁ māḍida phalamaneya
varu maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 7.376 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
